${modID}:Annihilate.NAME: Annihilate
${modID}:Annihilate.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage 3 times. NL Each time you deal unblocked damage the enemy loses 1 Strength. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Arsonist.NAME: Arsonist
${modID}:Arsonist.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! ${modID}:Heat. NL At the start of your turn, add a *Flash *Powder into your hand.

${modID}:BareBonesBlock.NAME: Bare Bones Block
${modID}:BareBonesBlock.DESCRIPTION: If you have no Block, gain !B! Block and !M! ${modID}:Poise.

${modID}:Batter.NAME: Batter
${modID}:Batter.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage twice. NL If the enemy has no Block, deal !D! damage an additional time.

${modID}:BendAndBreak.NAME: Bend and Break
${modID}:BendAndBreak.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Reckless. NL This card's cost always reduces from ${modID}:Reckless. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Apply !M! Weak.

${modID}:BlazingBlades.NAME: Blazing Blade
${modID}:BlazingBlades.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! ${modID}:Heat. NL Whenever you play an Attack this turn, ${modID}:Ignite a random enemy.

${modID}:Bloodlust.NAME: Bloodlust
${modID}:Bloodlust.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you apply ${modID}:Laceration, the enemy loses HP an additional time.

${modID}:BloodyCleavers.NAME: Bloody Cleavers
${modID}:BloodyCleavers.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage twice. NL Each time you deal unblocked damage, apply !M! ${modID}:Laceration.

${modID}:BoneCrusher.NAME: Bone Crusher
${modID}:BoneCrusher.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Reckless. NL Deal !D! damage. NL If this kills an enemy, ${modID}:Stun ALL enemies.

${modID}:BrandingIron.NAME: Branding Iron
${modID}:BrandingIron.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply 2 ${modID}:Fright. NL Apply !M! ${modID}:Oiled.

${modID}:Brawl.NAME: Brawl
${modID}:Brawl.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage twice. NL Add a *Fatigue into your hand.

${modID}:Bulldoze.NAME: Bulldoze
${modID}:Bulldoze.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Reckless. NL Gain !B! Block and deal !D! damage X times.

${modID}:Butchery.NAME: Butcher
${modID}:Butchery.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Reckless. NL Deal !D! damage and apply !${modID}:e! ${modID}:Laceration to a random enemy !M! times.

${modID}:Cauterize.NAME: Cauterize
${modID}:Cauterize.DESCRIPTION: Apply 3 ${modID}:Fright. NL When the enemy dies, heal !M! HP and ${modID}:Ignite ALL enemies. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Cleanse.NAME: Cleanse
${modID}:Cleanse.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Scrap your hand. NL Double your ${modID}:Scrap_Armor. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:CloseDown.NAME: Close Down
${modID}:CloseDown.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! Vulnerable. NL Gain !B! Block. NL Add a *Fatigue into your hand.

${modID}:Composed.NAME: Composed
${modID}:Composed.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, gain 1 ${modID}:Poise.
${modID}:Composed.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! ${modID}:Poise. NL At the start of your turn, gain 1 ${modID}:Poise.

${modID}:Cruelty.NAME: Cruelty
${modID}:Cruelty.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain !M! Block.

${modID}:CutOpen.NAME: Cut Open
${modID}:CutOpen.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply !M! ${modID}:Laceration to ALL enemies.

${modID}:Delirium.NAME: Delirium
${modID}:Delirium.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, draw !M! cards and add a *Fatigue into your discard pile.

${modID}:DoubleDown.NAME: Double Down
${modID}:DoubleDown.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Increase this card's damage by !M! and cost by 1 this combat.

${modID}:Dread.NAME: Dread
${modID}:Dread.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! ${modID}:Fright to ALL enemies. NL ALL enemies lose !${modID}:e! Strength. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Endure.NAME: Endure
${modID}:Endure.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! ${modID}:Poise. NL Gain !${modID}:e! ${modID}:Scrap_Armor. NL Add a *Fatigue into your hand.

${modID}:Explosives.NAME: Explosives
${modID}:Explosives.DESCRIPTION: Gain ${modID}:Heat until you have !M! ${modID}:Heat. NL Add 2 *Flash *Powders into your hand.

${modID}:Expose.NAME: Expose
${modID}:Expose.DESCRIPTION: Remove all Block from the enemy. NL Apply !M! Vulnerable. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:FanTheFlames.NAME: Fan the Flames
${modID}:FanTheFlames.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play a *Flash *Powder, NL draw !M! card.
${modID}:FanTheFlames.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play a *Flash *Powder, NL draw !M! cards.

${modID}:Fatigue.NAME: Fatigue
${modID}:Fatigue.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, increase this card's cost by 1. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Ferocity.NAME: Ferocity
${modID}:Ferocity.DESCRIPTION: Every 5 times ${modID}:Reckless increases the cost of a card, gain !M! Strength.

${modID}:Fervor.NAME: Fervor
${modID}:Fervor.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! ${modID}:Heat. NL Draw 1 card. NL Next turn, gain !M! ${modID}:Heat and draw 1 card.

${modID}:FesteringWounds.NAME: Festering Wounds
${modID}:FesteringWounds.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Apply !M! ${modID}:Laceration to a random enemy.
${modID}:FesteringWounds.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Apply !M! ${modID}:Laceration to ALL enemies.

${modID}:FirmGrip.NAME: Firm Grip
${modID}:FirmGrip.DESCRIPTION: Gain !${modID}:e! ${modID}:Poise. NL This turn, your next ${modID}:Reckless card is played twice.
${modID}:FirmGrip.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !${modID}:e! ${modID}:Poise. NL This turn, your next !M! ${modID}:Reckless cards are played twice.

${modID}:FlamingFist.NAME: Flaming Fist
${modID}:FlamingFist.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! ${modID}:Heat. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Add a *Flash *Powder into your hand.
${modID}:FlamingFist.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! ${modID}:Heat. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Add a *Flash *Powder+ into your hand.

${modID}:Fortitude.NAME: Fortitude
${modID}:Fortitude.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL ${modID}:Scrap 1 card. NL If it's a *Status card, gain !B! Block again.

${modID}:Frenzy.NAME: Frenzy Form
${modID}:Frenzy.DESCRIPTION: Gain 5 ${modID}:Poise. NL Whenever you lose all ${modID}:Poise, gain !M! ${modID}:Poise. NL ALL Attacks are ${modID}:Reckless.

${modID}:HackAndSlash.NAME: Hack and Slash
${modID}:HackAndSlash.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Reckless. NL Gain !B! Block and NL deal !D! damage for each card that increases its cost from this.

${modID}:HarvesterOfPain.NAME: Harvester of Pain
${modID}:HarvesterOfPain.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you ${modID}:Scrap or draw a *Status card, draw !M! card.

${modID}:Heatstroke.NAME: Heatstroke
${modID}:Heatstroke.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Gain 5 ${modID}:Heat. NL Add a *Flash *Powder into your hand.
${modID}:Heatstroke.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Gain 5 ${modID}:Heat. NL Add !M! *Flash *Powders into your hand.

${modID}:Hemorrhage.NAME: Hemorrhage
${modID}:Hemorrhage.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! ${modID}:Laceration. NL Enemy loses HP equal to its ${modID}:Laceration. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Hew.NAME: Hew
${modID}:Hew.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL ${modID}:Scrap a card in your discard pile.

${modID}:Impale.NAME: Impale
${modID}:Impale.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage and apply !M! ${modID}:Laceration to ALL enemies.

${modID}:Mangle.NAME: Mangle
${modID}:Mangle.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! ${modID}:Laceration and 1 Weak X times. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:MolotovCocktail.NAME: Molotov Cocktail
${modID}:MolotovCocktail.DESCRIPTION: Gain !${modID}:e! ${modID}:Heat. NL ${modID}:Ignite ALL enemies. NL Exhaust.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Gain !${modID}:e! ${modID}:Heat. NL ${modID}:Ignite !M! damage to ALL enemies. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:OilFlask.NAME: Oil Flask
${modID}:OilFlask.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! ${modID}:Oiled and Vulnerable to ALL enemies. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Onslaught.NAME: Overwhelm
${modID}:Onslaught.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply !M! ${modID}:Fright to ALL enemies.

${modID}:Outrage.NAME: Outrage
${modID}:Outrage.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If ${modID}:Reckless increased this card’s cost this turn, deal triple damage.

${modID}:Overheat.NAME: Overheat
${modID}:Overheat.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Ignite a random enemy !${modID}:e! times without reducing ${modID}:Heat. NL Exhaust.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Ignite !M! damage to a random enemy !${modID}:e! times without reducing ${modID}:Heat. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Pulverize.NAME: Pulverize
${modID}:Pulverize.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL ${modID}:Scrap 1 card. NL Deal !D! damage again for each [E] it costs.

${modID}:Pyromania.NAME: Pyromania
${modID}:Pyromania.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! ${modID}:Heat. Decrease this card's ${modID}:Heat by 1 this combat. NL Add 2 *Flash *Powders into your hand.

${modID}:Ransack.NAME: Ransack
${modID}:Ransack.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to a random enemy 3 times. NL Gain !M! *Gold for each different enemy hit. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Ravage.NAME: Ravage
${modID}:Ravage.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If you ${modID}:Scrap this card, increase its damage by !M! and add a copy of it into your discard pile.

${modID}:Razorhide.NAME: Razorhide
${modID}:Razorhide.DESCRIPTION: Gain 3 ${modID}:Scrap_Armor. NL ${modID}:Scrap_Armor deals damage an additional time.
${modID}:Razorhide.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain 3 ${modID}:Scrap_Armor. NL ${modID}:Scrap_Armor deals damage an additional !M! times.

${modID}:RendAndTear.NAME: Rend and Tear
${modID}:RendAndTear.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Scrap all non-Attack cards in your hand. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.

${modID}:Repulse.NAME: Repulse
${modID}:Repulse.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Apply !M! ${modID}:Fright to ALL enemies.

${modID}:Retool.NAME: Retool
${modID}:Retool.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Scrap 1 card. NL Add !M! Upgraded copies of the ${modID}:Scrapped card into your hand. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:RushOfBlood.NAME: Rush of Blood
${modID}:RushOfBlood.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you lose ${modID}:Poise, apply !M! ${modID}:Laceration to ALL enemies.

${modID}:Scorch.NAME: Scorch
${modID}:Scorch.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Ignite twice. NL If you have gained ${modID}:Heat this turn, gain !${modID}:e! ${modID}:Intensity.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Ignite !M! damage twice. NL If you have gained ${modID}:Heat this turn, gain !${modID}:e! ${modID}:Intensity.

${modID}:ShoulderBarge.NAME: Shoulder Barge
${modID}:ShoulderBarge.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL The next !M! times you attack this enemy, draw 1 card.

${modID}:SlicingStrike.NAME: Slicing Strike
${modID}:SlicingStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Deals additional damage equal to your ${modID}:Scrap_Armor.

${modID}:StareDown.NAME: Stare Down
${modID}:StareDown.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! ${modID}:Fright. NL If the enemy intends to attack, apply !${modID}:e! Weak.

${modID}:StrikeDown.NAME: Strike Down
${modID}:StrikeDown.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage for each unique debuff the enemy has.

${modID}:Subterfuge.NAME: Subterfuge
${modID}:Subterfuge.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Reckless. NL Choose a card that increased its cost. NL It costs 0 this turn. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Tenacity.NAME: Tenacity
${modID}:Tenacity.DESCRIPTION: Whenever ${modID}:Reckless increases the cost of a card, gain !M! Block.

${modID}:ThickSkinned.NAME: Thick Skinned
${modID}:ThickSkinned.DESCRIPTION: Gain !${modID}:e! ${modID}:Scrap_Armor. NL Prevent the next time you would lose ${modID}:Scrap_Armor. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:ThinkTwice.NAME: Think Twice
${modID}:ThinkTwice.DESCRIPTION: Gain 2 ${modID}:Poise. NL Draw !M! card. NL Next turn, gain [E].
${modID}:ThinkTwice.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain 2 ${modID}:Poise. NL Draw !M! cards. NL Next turn, gain [E].

${modID}:Thrill.NAME: Thrill of Battle
${modID}:Thrill.DESCRIPTION: ${modID}:Reckless. NL Gain !B! Block. NL Gain !M! Strength. NL At the end of this turn, lose !M! Strength.

${modID}:Thwart.NAME: Thwart
${modID}:Thwart.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw 1 card for each unique debuff the enemy has.

${modID}:Torment.NAME: Torment
${modID}:Torment.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! ${modID}:Fright. NL Whenever you gain Block this turn, deal !${modID}:e! damage to the enemy.

${modID}:UnleashAgony.NAME: Unleash Agony
${modID}:UnleashAgony.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies twice. NL Add a *Void into your discard pile.

${modID}:Unwavering.NAME: Unwavering
${modID}:Unwavering.DESCRIPTION: Draw !${modID}:e! cards. NL If ${modID}:Reckless changes this card's cost, gain [E] and discard it.
${modID}:Unwavering.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Draw !${modID}:e! cards. NL If ${modID}:Reckless changes this card's cost, NL gain [E] [E] and NL discard it.

${modID}:Unyielding.NAME: Unyielding
${modID}:Unyielding.DESCRIPTION: Add random cards into your hand until your hand is full. NL ${modID}:Scrap !M! cards. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:Unyielding.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Add random cards into your hand until your hand is full. NL ${modID}:Scrap up to !M! cards. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:ViolentOutburst.NAME: Violent Outburst
${modID}:ViolentOutburst.DESCRIPTION: Gain [E] [E]. NL Draw 3 cards. NL ${modID}:Scrap all non-Attack cards in your hand. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:ViolentOutburst.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain [E] [E] [E]. NL Draw 3 cards. NL ${modID}:Scrap all non-Attack cards in your hand. NL Exhaust.
